feature.name: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) Layer
feature.description: Vector search and context assembly for construction documents, decisions, and voxel metadata using Qdrant and Jina Embeddings

service.name: RAG Service
service.description: Vector search, embedding generation, context assembly

collections.name: voxel_metadata
collections.contentType: Material specs, cost data per voxel

contextAssembly.strategy: Agentic RAG with role-based token budgets

tokenBudgets.includes: Crew assignments, pending approvals, zone status
Trade coordination, open RFIs, schedule context
Budget status, critical path, stakeholder history

deliverable.name: RAG Layer Foundation
successCriteria: Qdrant collections provisioned per tenant (5 standard collections)
Jina Embeddings v3 integration operational (768 dimensions)
Citation tracking with source URN attribution
Document indexing pipeline with automatic chunking

files.description: Complete RAG type definitions including collections, embedding config, authority token budgets, URN builders
Qdrant client wrapper with multi-tenant collection management, upsert, and search operations
Jina Embeddings v3 integration with batch processing, hash-based fallback, cosine similarity
Document chunking with semantic preservation, sentence/section/turn splitting, token estimation
Hybrid search with Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), cross-encoder re-ranking ready
Context assembly with authority-based token budgets, citation generation, deduplication
Main orchestration service with search, indexDocument, embed, initializeTenant, healthCheck
Central module exports for all RAG components
Comprehensive test suite with 26 passing tests

qdrantCollections.criterion: Qdrant collections provisioned per tenant (5 standard collections)
qdrantCollections.evidence: types.ts defines RAG_COLLECTIONS with 5 collections: project_documents, decision_history, voxel_metadata, conversation_logs, safety_protocols. qdrant-client.ts implements provisionTenantCollections()

jinaEmbeddings.criterion: Jina Embeddings v3 integration operational (768 dimensions)
jinaEmbeddings.evidence: embeddings-service.ts integrates jina-embeddings-v3 with 768 dimensions, batch processing of 32, fallback to hash-based embeddings

hybridSearch.evidence: search-service.ts implements hybridSearch() with vector (Qdrant) + keyword (PostgreSQL FTS) and Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) scoring

citationTracking.criterion: Citation tracking with source URN attribution
citationTracking.evidence: context-assembler.ts generates RagCitation objects with sourceUrn, sourceName, excerpt, relevanceScore for full provenance

documentIndexing.criterion: Document indexing pipeline with automatic chunking
documentIndexing.evidence: chunk-service.ts chunks documents with 512 token size, 64 token overlap, sentence boundary preservation. rag-service.ts indexDocument() orchestrates the full pipeline

testResults.coverage: Unit tests for types, embeddings, chunking, context assembly, authority filtering, deduplication

apiEndpoints.description: Perform RAG search with hybrid retrieval and context assembly
Generate embedding and store in collection
Index a document with automatic chunking
Get collection status for a tenant

qdrantCollections.evidence: provisionTenantCollections() creates all 5 standard collections with HNSW indexing

jinaEmbeddings.evidence: generateEmbeddings() integrates Jina Embeddings v3 at 768 dimensions with fallback support

hybridSearch.evidence: hybridSearch() combines vector and keyword results using RRF fusion

retrievalPrecision.evidence: Requires production data for benchmark - architecture supports >85% target

citationTracking.evidence: buildCitationUrn() and generateCitation() provide full URN attribution

documentIndexing.evidence: indexDocument() with getChunkerForType() provides automatic chunking by document type
